article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.1.1. 14791 Amendment No. 1 Rez 25-04 (1030 Sperling Ave) CD 2025.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Rezoning of 1030 Sperling Ave in Burnaby for 'Sperling Court' Development
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would rezone the property at 1030 Sperling Ave in Burnaby to allow a new development called 'Sperling Court,' designed by Kennith Kim Architecture Inc. If approved, any construction on the site must follow the approved Comprehensive Development Plan.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — this rezoning could affect nearby property values and development activity.
